title: frankenia laevis subsp. intermedia
intro: Frankenia laevis subsp. intermedia, commonly known as the Frankenia or sea heath, is a shrub-like plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Frankenia laevis subsp. intermedia include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne, wounds, and eczema, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Frankenia laevis subsp. intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used in topical applications for their therapeutic properties.
